landing.hero_description: Usoro nchekwa maka ikposa ihe mere na-amaghi onye na inweta nkwado
landing.ngo_description: Jikwaa ihe mere, nyere ndị merụrụ ahụ aka

features.anonymous_description: Kpọsa ihe mere n'udo na-amaghi onye
features.support_description: Kparịta ụka na ndị ọkachamara ozugbo
features.space_description: Nzuzo gị na nchekwa gị bụ ihe dị mkpa

dashboard.help_available: Enyemaka dị mgbe niile. Nchekwa gị dị mkpa.

incident_types.unwanted_touching: Imetụ aka na-achọghị ma ọ bụ mmekpa ahụ

report.title: Tinye Mkpọsa
report.anonymous_notice: Mkpọsa gị bụ nke na-amaghi onye kpamkpam ma ọ bụghị na ị họọrọ inye ozi nkwurịta okwu.
report.description_placeholder: Gwa anyị ihe mere n'okwu gị. Ị nwere ike ide ọtụtụ ma ọ bụ ntakịrị dịka ị chọrọ...
report.description_help: Kọwa ihe mere, mgbe o mere, na ebe o mere. Jiri okwu dị mfe.
report.upload_files: Tinye foto, vidiyo, ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ
report.file_types: Ruo 10MB maka faịlụ ọ bụla. Ndị a nabatara: JPG, PNG, PDF, MP4
report.categorize_optional: Nyere anyị aka hazie nke a (Nhọrọ)
report.category_placeholder: Họrọ ụdị ma ọ bụrụ na ị chọrọ
report.category_help: Nke a na-enyere anyị aka ijikọ gị na ndị kwesịrị ekwesị, mana ị nwere ike iłefere nke a.
report.contact_info: Tinye ozi nkwurịta okwu maka nhụsianya
report.contact_optional: Nhọrọ: Nye ozi nkwurịta okwu gị ma ọ bụrụ na ị chọrọ ka anyị sochie mkpọsa gị
report.accuracy_notice: Site n'itinye mkpọsa a, ị na-ekwupụta na ozi enyere bụ eziokwu dịka ị maara.

confirmation.review_notice: Anyị ga-elele mkpọsa gị n'ime awa 24. Ị nwere obi ike ikwu okwu.
confirmation.what_next: Kedu ihe ị chọrọ ime ọzọ?
confirmation.talk_description: Kparịta ụka na onye inyeaka ugbu a
confirmation.help_description: Lee ebe ndị nwere ike inyere gị aka
confirmation.safety_message: Enyemaka dị mgbe niile. Nchekwa gị dị mkpa.
